raw:
{
  "summary": "Graham argues that list-of-n articles are popular because their explicit, compartmentalized structure makes them easy to read and also safe for writers. The format can be legitimate for true catalogs, but it limits discovery and new thought, which are the core value of real essays. He warns that beginners should learn the form openly, yet also learn to escape it to write dynamic essays.",
